name: Clock
description: Full-screen clock with digital, analog, minimal, and flip faces. Uses device time — no network required.

theme.description: Color scheme. Auto follows the device/OS preference.

time_format.description: 12- or 24-hour time. Auto uses locale default.

show_seconds.description: Show seconds (digital, minimal, flip, and analog second hand).

show_date.description: Show the date below the clock.

font_weight.description: Weight of the primary time display.

accent_color.description: Accent color for hands, separators, and highlights. Leave empty for theme default.

color.description: Override text color (legacy). Leave empty to use the theme foreground.

background.description: Override background color (legacy). Leave empty to use the theme background.
